Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-14-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The case has settled. The court ordered the case set for an Order to Show Cause re: CRC 3.1385 on 12/14/10 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
